hero.title: Your best companion for your journey
titleOptions: The best companion for your journey
hero.subtitle: Travel comfortably and affordably across Uzbekistan

features.driverDesc: Every driver on our platform is personally verified. Safety is our #1 priority.
features.priceDesc: Travel for up to 60% less than standard taxi services across the country.
features.bookingDesc: Find your ride in seconds. No calls, no waiting, just easy travel.

cta.title: Ready to start your first trip?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of travelers today and experience the best ride-sharing in Uzbekistan.

bus.description: Soon you will be able to book bus tickets through our platform. We are currently working with the best carriers.

carpool.title: Carpool - Travel with Companions
carpool.subtitle: Share costs and make new friends
carpool.description: Through our carpool service, you can find drivers heading your way or announce your own trip.
